$comment: Starter workflow templates for the filesystem backend. Copy to .pipeline/workflows.json (or let `/pipeline init` scaffold it). Each workflow is an ordered list of agent steps; a per-ticket molecule (.pipeline/molecules/<id>.json) is instantiated from one of these at intake and advanced by the orchestrator. `default` is used when intake doesn't pick a template. Per-step `when`/`loop` are evaluated by the orchestrator (Phase 2): `when` is a guard the orchestrator skips the step when false; `loop` keeps the cursor on the step until a condition clears.

conditions.hasCodeChanges: the ticket produced a diff (worker/specialist touched source files)
conditions.touchesUI: the diff includes UI files (e.g. *.tsx, components/, pages/)
conditions.until-approved: loop: re-dispatch while unresolved human comments exist; ends when the human approves (moves the ticket to ready-for-human/done)
